title: Creamy Delicate Chinese Epoisses Wonton Soup
description: A comforting Chinese wonton soup featuring citrusy epoisses cheese and a creamy broth.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic, cooking until fragrant.
Pour in the low-sodium chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the softened Epoisses cheese, stirring until melted.
Add the citrus juice, soy sauce, and stir to combine.
Bring the broth to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the wonton filling by mixing together the softened Epoisses cheese and chopped green onions.
Place a wonton wrapper on a flat surface and spoon a small amount of the cheese mixture onto the center of the wrapper.
Dip your finger in water and run it along the edges of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point, pressing the edges together to seal the wonton.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Once the broth has finished cooking, carefully add the wontons to the pot.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the wontons are cooked through and float to the surface.
